svg.title: CookedTranslate architecture
svg.desc: A diagram showing how the Chrome extension, FastAPI backend, external services, and the internal pipeline work together.

g.text: Detects videoId, polls backend, renders overlay
Runs on your machine / Ubuntu server

svg.text: Up to 3 chunks processed in parallel

g.text: Second view: instant, zero API cost
Solid arrows = request flow. Dashed = data flowing back to the extension as chunks finish.
